name: custom-error-pages
description: Create full sets of custom HTTP error pages for Nginx, Apache or other web servers. Fully customizable & supports multiple languages.

scripts.clean-install: npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm --silent install && echo Cleaned node_modules and reinstalled dependencies...
scripts.clean-build: npx rimraf dist && echo Cleaned dist folder...
scripts.clean: npm run clean-install && npm run clean-build
scripts.test-html: npx eslint src/html/template.ejs && echo Success! Passed html tests!
scripts.test-css: npx stylelint src/css/style.scss && echo Success! Passed scss tests!
scripts.test-js: npx eslint src/js/script.js && echo Success! Passed js tests!
scripts.test: npm run test-html && npm run test-css && npm run test-js
scripts.build-css-sass: npx sass src/css/style.scss dist/css/style.css && echo Built css with sass...
scripts.build-css-postcss: npx postcss dist/css/style.css --output dist/css/style.min.css && echo Built min.css with postcss...
scripts.build-css: npm run build-css-sass && npm run build-css-postcss
scripts.build-js: npx terser src/js/script.js --output dist/js/script.min.js --compress --mangle --source-map && echo Built .min.js with terser...
scripts.build-fonts: npx copyfiles -u 1 src/fonts/* dist && echo Copied fonts...
scripts.build: npm run build-html && npm run build-css && npm run build-js && npm run build-fonts && echo SUCCESS! Fully built!
scripts.fullbuild: npm run clean && npm run test && npm run build
